Description.enUS:
Massive flying unit. Can drain energy, shields, and life from targets. Can destroy enemy projectiles. Can be upgraded to raise units slain nearby as temporary shades.

Detector

Ascended:
+70 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
+1.0 Speed
Wraith Night

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.

Tooltip.enUS:
+70 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
+1.0 Speed
Wraith Night

+70 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
+1.0 Speed
Wraith Night
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.
Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Scan-moving units will not engage enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Scan-moving units will not engage enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: The Grim Glider is permanently cloaked.
This unit can detect cloaked, burrowed, and hallucinated units.
Tooltip.ruRU: This unit can detect cloaked, burrowed, and hallucinated units.

Tooltip.enUS: Friendly Shades in range of Grim Gliders with Wraith Night do not decay.
Destroys a nearby enemy projectile.

Activates Mortality's Eclipse, raising all combat units that die within 10 range of a Grim Glider as uncontrollable Shades that last for 8 seconds.

Drains 17.9 energy per second.
Deactivates Mortality's Eclipse to conserve energy.

Prevents the target from using abilities, slows their movement speed by 50%, and drains 50 energy, 20 shields, and 10 life each second.

The Grim Glider gains half of these values as energy except when damaging biological life, which is gained as life.
This unit can detect cloaked or burrowed units within its sight range.
Tooltip.ruRU: Эта боевая единица может обнаруживать замаскированные или закопанные войска в поле обзора.

Tooltip.enUS: This Dragon is more powerful.
